name: Usage Insights
description: Tracks token usage and estimated model costs across sessions, providers, models, and NordRelay peers.
author: Ricardo <github@nordbyte.de>

collectors.title: Collect usage
collectors.description: Samples normalized NordRelay session usage on this node and stores cumulative and delta usage.

commands.name: collect
commands.title: Collect usage
commands.description: Collect and persist one usage snapshot from the local node.

commands.name: panel-data
commands.title: Panel data
commands.description: Return token, provider, model, node, session, and time-range summaries.

commands.name: refresh-prices
commands.title: Refresh model prices
commands.description: Fetch the latest public model price catalog and store supported model rates.

commands.name: price-catalog
commands.title: Price catalog
commands.description: Return configured and fetched model price rules.

commands.name: export
commands.title: Export usage
commands.description: Export usage deltas as JSON or CSV.

commands.name: cleanup
commands.title: Cleanup old usage
commands.description: Delete usage delta rows older than the configured retention window.

commands.name: storage-health
commands.title: Storage health
commands.description: Return SQLite storage health for Usage Insights.

settings.label: Price catalog URL
settings.description: Remote model price catalog. LiteLLM's public catalog includes input, output, cached input, and cache creation fields for many models.

settings.label: Auto refresh prices
settings.description: Refresh the remote price catalog when it is stale.

settings.label: Price refresh hours
settings.description: How long fetched model prices stay fresh.
